title: Spoore Infection
body:
_It's will be hard to survive. You don't now how long you can still alive. With each next day it will be harder. More dangerous, stronger, bigger creatures._

# **What you can do?**

- 🌍 Explore world 
- 🔎 Find resources
- 🔫 Craft weapon 
- 🛖 Buid base
- 📺 Do other things
